pi_items.source: Task description mandates identification of cross-sections with Max Channel Velocity exceeding 4.0 ft/s.
Task description explicitly requires creating the CSV report at this path.
Task description explicitly requires creating the plot at this path.
Verified by task_utils.sh where MUNCIE_DIR is set and the Muncie project is restored to this directory.

The simulation uses plan index 04 (.p04). While running the simulation produces 'Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf', the expected final result file (if finalized or run via task_utils.sh) is 'Muncie.p04.hdf', which export_result.sh accepts.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the HEC-RAS Muncie project, a real-world dataset. The simulation runs on plan 04 and generates Unsteady flow velocity data in an HDF5 output file (Muncie.p04.hdf or Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf). The velocity threshold of 4.0 ft/s and all output paths match the task description. An independent execution of the simulation confirms that max channel velocities exceed 4.0 ft/s at exactly 59 river stations. Note that river station IDs are found under 'Geometry/Cross Sections/Attributes' (column index 2), which might cause evaluation bugs since the verifier's ground truth script expects them under 'Geometry/Cross Sections/River Stations'.
